name: Cinnamon Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
(Makes 1 gallon.)
1. Combine the Half and half, cinnamon sticks and vanilla bean in a heavy large saucepan.
2. Scald over very low heat.
3. Remove from heat, cover and let stand at room temperature for at least 1 hour.
4. In a large bowl of electric mixer, combine sugar and egg yolks and beat at high speed until the mixture forms slowly dissolving ribbon when beaters are lifted.
5. Reheat Half and half over low heat.
6. Gradually beat 2 cups of Half and half into egg yolk mixture.
7. Stir yolk mixture into remaining Half and half.
8. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until a thermometer registers 180°F and custard coats the back of spoon; do not boil.
9. Immediately transfer custard to a large bowl.
10. Cool at least 2 hours. If possible, cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
11. Strain custard, discarding cinnamon sticks and vanilla bean.
12. Whisk in whipping cream.
13. Transfer to ice cream maker (in batches if necessary) and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
14. To serve, spoon into a large bowl and garnish with fresh strawberries.
